Overview

This section provides reference materials organized by topic:

Concepts (Concepts)

Key concepts, terminology, and architectural foundations. Includes glossary and theoretical background.

References (References)

Academic papers, technical documentation, and external resources. Organized by topic: robotics, control, SLAM, embedded systems, etc.

Troubleshooting (Troubleshooting)

Common issues and solutions for development and deployment. Organized by subsystem and error type.

User Manual (user_manual)

Comprehensive user guides and best practices.

Quick Links to Documentation

Variants

  • Wall-E Robot - Wall-E robot documentation

  • Gas Robot Variant - Gas Robot variant documentation

Getting Started

  • Getting Started - Initial setup and configuration

Core Platforms

  • Architecture - System architecture

  • Communication Model - Communication protocols

  • System Contract - System contract and interfaces

Subsystems

Wall-E:

  • Control System - Motion control

  • Feedback System - Sensor feedback

  • Localization - Localization and mapping

Gas Robot:

  • Communication - Communication layer

  • Hardware Interfaces - Hardware drivers

  • Perception - Sensor fusion

  • State Estimation - State tracking

  • Navigation - Path planning

  • Mapping - Environmental mapping

  • CV Pipeline - Computer vision

Development

  • Workflow and Commands - Development workflow and tools

  • ESP32 Controller - Firmware documentation

  • ROS 2 Software Stacks - ROS 2 software stacks

Deployment

  • WiFi Provisioning - WiFi provisioning and deployment
